title: Height Difference Filter Feature
description: 'minecraft:height_difference_filter_feature' filters away positions based on the heightmap around the placement position. The filter will check for surface blocks in each cardinal direction within the `search_radius`. Each block will be checked against all given conditions.

places_feature.title: Places Feature
places_feature.description: Named reference of feature to be placed.

min_required_upward_height_diff.title: Min Required Upward Height Diff
min_required_upward_height_diff.description: Specifies the minimum height difference required upwards.

max_required_downward_height_diff.title: Max Required Downward Height Diff
max_required_downward_height_diff.description: Specifies the maximum height difference required downwards.

min_allowed_upward_height_diff.title: Min Allowed Upward Height Diff
min_allowed_upward_height_diff.description: Specifies the minimum height difference allowed upwards.

max_allowed_downward_height_diff.title: Max Allowed Downward Height Diff
max_allowed_downward_height_diff.description: Specifies the maximum height difference allowed downwards.

search_radius.title: Search Radius
search_radius.description: Specifies the the length in each cardinal direction the filter will check for blocks against the given differences.
